name: No CI config found — ask rather than assume GitHub Actions
query: I want to add Chromatic to my CI pipeline.
context: The project has no CI config files: no .github/workflows/, no .gitlab-ci.yml, no Jenkinsfile, no azure-pipelines.yml, no .circleci/config.yml, no bitbucket-pipelines.yml.
expected_behavior: Searches for CI config files and finds none
Asks the user which CI provider they use before generating any configuration
Does not assume or default to GitHub Actions without confirmation
success_criteria: The response asks the user which CI provider they use
The response does not generate a GitHub Actions workflow without the user confirming they use GitHub Actions
